use_when: Create, edit, improve, evaluate, or validate one agent skill and its resources
avoid_when: Naming-only, compression-only, or consolidating multiple existing skills

use_when: Suggest, validate, or apply an agent asset name when naming is the primary task
avoid_when: Content or structure changes where naming is incidental

use_when: Compress one explicitly named agent asset while preserving behavior and safety constraints
avoid_when: Broad directory compression, code formatting, or no explicit target

use_when: Consolidate multiple related existing skills into one routing skill or migrate a routing skill structure
avoid_when: Creating one new regular skill, renaming assets, or unrelated skill edits
